title: Ghostmoon.app – The Swiss Army Knife for your macOS menu bar
full_text:
Every feature you need. Two clicks away.

The essential powertool for macOS.

 

Gain access to system functionalities buried deep in System Settings or ones that require writing Terminal commands. Control the macOS User Interface. Keep the Mac awake during long tasks and quickly turn off displays when needed. Mass Eject External Drives in a safe way. Quickly switch Audio Output devices. Mute the Internal Microphone for privacy. Measure the speed and latency of your internet connection. Quickly restart the Network Stack. Reset internal macOS databases. Empty the Trash when it doesn't want to cooperate. Refresh the system without logging you out. Generate cryptographically Secure Passwords and Unique Identifiers. Battery Health. Essential System Stats. It's all there.

 

Microscopic app size & resource usage.

 

Apple Silicon and Intel processors.

macOS 13 Ventura or newer.

 Download for Free

 

 IMPORTANT
This is a pre-release. The App is not yet signed/notarized, so after launching it for the first time - which will give you the typical macOS Gatekeeper warning - you'll have to go to System Settings > Privacy & Security, scroll to the bottom and click "Open Anyway".

 Alternatively, copy & paste the following command into the macOS Terminal after copying the App to the Applications folder:

 sudo xattr -rd com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Ghostmoon.app
 

 

If you intend to use Ghostmoon in a commercial setting (e.g., work computer, company, studio) or simply appreciate the App and would like to support the Project, please consider making a Donation of any amount.

 

As a thank you gift, you will receive a Supporter Certificate which unlocks Ghostmoon XE with additional features within the App.

 

Ghostmoon XE

 

Quickly switch Audio Input devices. Mass Eject Time Machine Volumes.
Display Mac Hostname and copy to clipboard. Battery cycles.
Extended Password Generator.

 

For Project Supporters.Donate →
